font.usage: Locked retro pixel/8-bit UI font. Workers must not choose substitutes.

rules: Runtime assets are reference-derived transparent PNG chrome pieces, not full-screen references.
Use nine_slice_margin for variable-size Slate/UMG box brushes.
No baked runtime labels, names, values, timers, scores, portraits, inventory items, or offers.
Icons generated by imagegen live in IconGeneration and Slices/IconsGenerated, separate from chrome sheets.
Top bar is allowed only on main_menu, account_status, achievements, settings, language_select, minigames, and powerup.
